description: Craft is a document and note-taking workspace for writing, tasks, daily notes, collections, and collaboration across web and native apps. It lets users organize and share content, and offers API/MCP-based access to selected workspace content.
summary: Craft exposes a documented HTTP API via per-connection endpoints plus a streamable HTTP MCP server at `https://mcp.craft.do/my/mcp`; both require user-granted access from a Craft workspace.
